RCMP constable.t: INCIDENT DATE: 2003.08.16. Flagged from an off-duty RCMP member's occurrence report, filed through

else.t: INCIDENT DATE: 2003.08.16. Flagged from OPP general occurrence log,

seg.t: , Manitoulin Island. Twenty-three adults on scene. No fatalities. No injuries consistent with assault. No charges laid.
WITNESSES (22): no coherent recall of a period of approx.
hours. Reports of a "party," embarrassment, waking undressed. Statements do not corroborate one another, or the scene.

WITNESS (1): full and consistent recall. Describes a five-point figure marked in chalk on the dock, ringed with candles, and its deliberate disruption. Figure photographed and logged. No determination as to function. Classification:
